Will Silver Prime purchases be at one point converted to the national / regional price value of each individual country? For example, in countries with a weaker dollar, the cost of 5 USD in their currency can equate to roughly 3 meals in their currency. Take Vietnam for instance, for every 1 USD it will be equivalent to 26k Vietnamese Dong; which can then be used to pay for street food such as pho, banh mi and spring rolls for as little as 20k Vietnamese Dong each. Then compare that to mid to high value paid packs such as the recent Silver Frost Archives pack valued at 980 Silver Prime (or 15 USD) or the Dawnbringer's Guidance valued at 3280 Silver Prime (or 50 USD.) While players like them can simply choose not to pay for the Silver Prime in USD using their national currency, they will miss out alot on many mid to high value paid packs in the coming future.
Thank you for your suggestion. I have already conveyed it to the project team🌹

content:
如果我在吃一個便當，我可能會描述米飯、菜、肉，但我可能不會另外說「便當」怎樣。同理，蛋糕在這段敘述中可以是一個整體。餅乾、奶油、櫻桃全部加起來是蛋糕。

又或者，這裏的蛋糕「體」是戚風蛋糕之類的填充物。

總之以我吃蛋糕的經驗我可以想像如果有一個蛋糕的內容物有餅乾、奶油、櫻桃，那他是一塊怎樣的蛋糕。我不會覺得「蛋糕不存在」。
thread_title: ✅「已回答」繁中，杜勒賽因繁衍狂熱劇情錯字與描述疑惑。

content:
類似的例子還可以舉很多：如果是水餃鍋貼，那就是拆分成麵皮與餡料；如果是漢堡，拆分成麵包、菜、肉、番茄⋯⋯。蛋糕與水餃鍋貼漢堡相同等級，是料理的「整體」，而非「主體」。

原句或許會讓沒有吃過類似杜勒描述的這種蛋糕的人，以及認為蛋糕僅限於嚴格意義的海綿體的人產生疑惑，但我認為蛋糕與後面一串敘述的客觀事實並非必然產生衝突，直接說「那個不是蛋糕所以不應該這樣寫」恐怕有點武斷了。
